description: Ensure text has sufficient contrast using APCA (Advanced Perceptual Contrast Algorithm).
notes: APCA replaces WCAG 2.x contrast ratios. Lc 60 minimum for body text.

description: Ensure UI components and graphics have sufficient contrast.
notes: APCA Lc 45 minimum for non-text items.

description: Use legible fonts, sufficient line spacing (1.5x), and limit paragraph width (80 chars max).
All inputs must have visible, persistent labels and clear error messages.
Use correct HTML semantics for headings, regions, and lists to build a logical structure.
All functionality must be operable via keyboard without specific timings or multiple keystrokes.
Focus must be highly visible and not obscured by other content.
Provide accurate captions for all prerecorded audio/video and transcripts for audio-only.
Write at a lower secondary education reading level. Use simple sentences and common vocabulary.
Touch targets must be at least 44x44 CSS pixels with sufficient spacing.
